message:
refactor(session): optimize save path to avoid full Session clone

The JSONL save path previously cloned the entire Session (including all
entries) for the background save thread. This is expensive for sessions
with many entries.

Refactor to:
- Only clone header (small) and take ownership of entries via
  std::mem::take, returning them after the save completes
- Add session_entry_stats() helper to compute message count and session
  name from entries without needing the full Session
- Use index_session_snapshot() instead of index_session() for the
  session index update, passing only the needed data
- Rebuild entry_ids HashSet after entries are returned (both success
  and error paths)
- Apply same pattern to SQLite save path

Also includes rustfmt cleanup of proptest strategies in session tests
(formatting only).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
